text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at a certain concert venue...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I know you're just a guest performer today, but
it's still your first concert. Do you feel all right?
Would you like some water?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Don't you worry about me! I'll make sure to
show everyone a great time!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You look ready to take on the world!
Okay, go get 'em!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Huh, the opening act's just some no-name artist.
Guess I'll go buy a drink.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
(Do your best... All I can do now is watch over
you...)

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
King! You came to listen to her perform? I'm so
glad to see you like her! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
P-Pearl?! I-I wouldn't go so far as to say that I like
her or anything...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I was curious to know what she's like since I kept
hearing her song every day in the academy
announcements...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
After all, a first-rate Umamusume like me must
familiarize herself with all kinds of music!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
Hello! Not many of you are listening, but I'm still
going to sing with my whole heart... so I can
inspire you all to stay positive, no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Don't worry, King. You'll learn aaall about
what she's like.

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, what's going on? Is that a concert
happening? Huh? Who's that singing?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text: FIGHT OOOON!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, she's really good! Listening to her's getting
me all fired up! She's the best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"However tough the times, don't give up"—her
message lights a blazing fire in the listeners'
hearts.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
So what did you think? Doesn't her sound touch
your soul?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well... I want to say it was too noisy, but... I
suppose that's just your type of music, Pearl.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Still... what a song. It felt like my heart was being
assaulted by a battering ram.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I do love her music! But that's not all.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I want her to be rewarded for all the struggle and
hard work she's gone through singing to people
who pass her by on the street.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But... that's just—

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Wishful thinking? I know. I know there are many
things that don't come true no matter how hard
someone tries. That's simply reality.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I support her exactly because I know how noble,
yet futile, hard work can be!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You understand it too, don't you? How much the
power of even a single voice can support
someone?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
The moment someone is ready to give up, that's
when you yell the loudest. When they're about to
lose faith, you give them that push.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
So I'm going to cheer that girl on, with all my
might, until broken dreams become a thing of the
past!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Supporters and the supported stand on opposite
sides of the same coin. Or rather, they're what
each other sees when looking into the mirror.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Heh. No wonder...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's why it felt like she was singing about me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I pass by the front of the station...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
Pearl, I wanna write a song based off you! I'm sure
it'll inspire others chasing after their own dreams!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That sounds fantastic! You're going to make me
an Umamusume who changes the world!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Let's aim for the stars and make a song that'll fill
the world with courage!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have a strong feeling that as long as those two
work together, they'll be able to make that dream
come true!
